task_completion.description: Verify the CT Cranium scan is loaded in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The InVesalius interface displays 2D slices (Axial, Coronal, Sagittal) of a human cranium in the viewing panes.

task_completion.description: Set the segmentation threshold range to 1500 to 3071 HU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the threshold or segmentation panel on the left, the minimum value is set to 1500 and the maximum is set to 3071 (or the scan's maximum, typically 3033). The 2D slices should show a highlighted mask primarily over the teeth and dense bone.

task_completion.description: Create a 3D surface model from the segmentation mask.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model consisting only of teeth and dense bone (not the full skull) is visible in the 3D viewer pane (usually bottom-right), or a new surface is listed in the '3D surfaces' panel.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/enamel_model.stl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export 3D surface' dialog is visible with the file name 'enamel_model.stl' entered, the directory set to '/home/ga/Documents/', and the file type set to STL (Binary if the option is visible).
A 'Save Project' dialog is visible with the file name 'enamel_project.inv3' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the main application window title bar updates to display 'enamel_project.inv3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the InVesalius menus, threshold panels, and export dialogs, rather than just typing terminal commands or running a Python script.

integrity.description: The 3D model generated represents the correct anatomical structures.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D model in the viewer shows isolated teeth and dense bone fragments. It should NOT look like a complete skull, which would indicate the threshold was not applied correctly.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the software by creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not use a text editor, `touch`, or `echo` commands in the terminal to simply create empty files named 'enamel_model.stl' and 'enamel_project.inv3'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CT Cranium scan (0051) is a real medical dataset with an HU range of -1024 to 3033. The upper threshold may snap to 3033 instead of 3071, which is acceptable. The lower threshold must be set to 1500. A correct segmentation will isolate the teeth (dentition) and dense petrous bone, resulting in a sparse 3D model (volume ~5,000-250,000 mm³), not the full skull (>350,000 mm³). Verify the STL is saved to /home/ga/Documents/enamel_model.stl and the project to /home/ga/Documents/enamel_project.inv3.
